name: vcdn-sdk-workspace
description: Video CDN SDK for upload, streaming (HLS), and playback integration
author: vcdn

scripts.pack:dry-run: mkdir -p .artifacts && pnpm --dir shared pack --pack-destination ../.artifacts && pnpm --dir browser pack --pack-destination ../.artifacts && pnpm --dir node pack --pack-destination ../.artifacts
scripts.publish:check: pnpm run build && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run pack:dry-run
